metadata.title:
Railway to Assist


In Sale Of Propertles.

pages.raw_text:
G. ". Mott, manager Of the immi-
grafton department OF the Northern
Pacific railway, is in the city for q
few days. While here he will meet
all the real estate agents with a
view to obtaining list Of farms and
ranch properties offered for sale.
These will be distributed by the rail-
way company's special agents
throughout the middle east, who will
work up interest in the Inland En-
pire and personally conduct parties
to Spokane. Mr.. Mott obtained con-
siderable literature at the chamber
of commerce.


Elmer e. Johnston, executive COM
missioner of the Washington state
exhibit to the worlds fair at St
Louis Ia here. This morning he met
C. e. Mitchell. chairman Of the
marble committee, appointed by the
chamber of commerce, and discussed
the plan for the proposed main stair
way in the Washington building.
which Is to be built out OF marble
contributed by the difrerent marble
companies.
